blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.0 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,911 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
